languages.text: Шаттлы возвращаются. В голосах пилотов-разведчиков, отчитывающихся по вокс-каналу, слышится страх и тайное облегчение.
The shuttles are returning. The voices of the scout pilots reporting over the vox-channel are filled with fear and secret relief.
languages.original_text: Шаттлы возвращаются. В голосах пилотов-разведчиков, отчитывающихся по вокс-каналу, слышится страх и тайное облегчение.

traits.locale_text: The shuttles are returning. The voices of the scout pilots reporting over the vox-channel are filled with fear and secret relief.
The shuttles are returning. The voices of the scout pilots reporting over the vox-channel are filled with fear and secret relief.
The shuttles return with rich bounty. The voices of the scout pilots reporting over the vox-channel are filled with fear and secret relief.
The shuttles are returning. The voices of the scout pilots reporting over the vox-channel are filled with fear and secret relief.
The shuttles are returning. The voices of the scout pilots reporting over the vox-channel are filled with fear and secret relief.

languages.text: シャトルは富を携えて帰還する。スカウトパイロットの報告は、恐怖と秘めた安堵に満ちている。
languages.original_text: The shuttles return with rich bounty. The voices of the scout pilots reporting over the vox-channel are filled with fear and secret relief.

traits.locale_text: シャトルは富を携えて帰還する。スカウトパイロットの報告は、恐怖と秘めた安堵に満ちている。

languages.text: Las lanzaderas vuelven. Las voces de los pilotos de exploración por el canal de voco combinan miedo y alivio secreto.
languages.original_text: The shuttles are returning. The voices of the scout pilots reporting over the vox-channel are filled with fear and secret relief.

traits.locale_text: Las lanzaderas vuelven. Las voces de los pilotos de exploración por el canal de voco combinan miedo y alivio secreto.

languages.text: 穿梭机正在返航。音阵频道里，侦察飞行员的汇报声中满是恐惧，还有一丝劫后余生的庆幸。
languages.original_text: The shuttles are returning. The voices of the scout pilots reporting over the vox-channel are filled with fear and secret relief.

traits.locale_text: 穿梭机正在返航。音阵频道里，侦察飞行员的汇报声中满是恐惧，还有一丝劫后余生的庆幸。

languages.text: Die Shuttles kehren zurück. Die Stimmen der Piloten, die sich auf dem Voxkanal melden, sind von Angst und heimlicher Erleichterung erfüllt.
languages.original_text: The shuttles are returning. The voices of the scout pilots reporting over the vox-channel are filled with fear and secret relief.

traits.locale_text: Die Shuttles kehren zurück. Die Stimmen der Piloten, die sich auf dem Voxkanal melden, sind von Angst und heimlicher Erleichterung erfüllt.

languages.text: Mekikler dönüyor. Voks kanalından rapor veren keşif pilotlarının sesleri, korku ve gizli bir rahatlamayla dolu.
languages.original_text: The shuttles are returning. The voices of the scout pilots reporting over the vox-channel are filled with fear and secret relief.

traits.locale_text: Mekikler dönüyor. Voks kanalından rapor veren keşif pilotlarının sesleri, korku ve gizli bir rahatlamayla dolu.

languages.text: Les navettes s'en reviennent. Sur le canal-vox, les voix des pilotes éclaireurs sont empreintes d'autant de peur que de soulagement.
languages.original_text: The shuttles are returning. The voices of the scout pilots reporting over the vox-channel are filled with fear and secret relief.
